reviews.review_description:
D-Day VR Museum delivers a respectful and immersive way to explore one of history’s most important events.
The amount of historical content, 3D scanned artifacts and detailed locations makes the experience feel authentic and educational.
A very interesting VR experience for history fans, students and anyone curious about the Normandy landings.

I love the inclusion of Quest Achievements as it makes exploring every inch of the museum worth it! An awesome combination of photos, videos, and interactive elements - feels like the future of education.
